hooks.command: cd /home/ivan/nexus/LaundryLog && if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain)" ]; then git add -A && git commit -m "chore: turn-end safety net $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"; fi && if [ -n "$(git log @{u}..HEAD 2>/dev/null)" ] || ! git rev-parse @{u} >/dev/null 2>&1; then git push -u origin "$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD)"; fi
